.gitignore.general_idea: Add the site directory to gitignore to exclude generated site content from version control.
Add the __pycache__ directory to gitignore to exclude Python bytecode cache files.

README.md.general_idea: The README was drastically simplified by removing detailed step-by-step workshop instructions, code snippets, and troubleshooting notes.
README.md.human_impl: Removed ~400 lines of instructional text, keeping only a brief description and links to the docs directory.

README.md.general_idea: The project title in the README header was changed to lowercase kebab-case.
References to workshop steps were updated to point to specific directories rather than inline instructions.
README.md.human_impl: Added text 'The final state of each step is available in the [step-XX](step-XX) directory.'
